SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HORNEFF WADDLE CO. DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUGAR PLUM PROPERTIES SCHER, DANNY $1,886.85 PRINCIPAL, $189.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,075.85, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DANNY SCHER ON NOV-23-2010 - DENIED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
